home_device_overview_description: Manage and view your connected battery monitoring devices
home_device_overview_no_devices: Connect a hardware device to start tracking data.

me_tip_text: Use the side navigation to view analysis and alerts, and export historical data in the page.
about_info_desc: Real-time battery monitoring to help you better understand and manage your device's power usage
about_info_privacy: This app complies with relevant privacy policies and terms of use
about_feature_realtime: Real-time battery monitoring and data analysis
help_desc_monitor: View real-time battery level and charging status on the home screen
help_desc_alerts: Go to Settings → Notifications to enable battery alerts and customize thresholds
help_desc_history: Access your battery usage history in the Analysis tab to track patterns
help_desc_manage: Add and manage multiple devices from Settings → Device Management
help_faq_q1: How do I enable battery notifications?
help_faq_a1: Go to Settings → Notifications and toggle "Enable Notifications" and "Battery Alerts" switches. Make sure your system has notification permissions enabled for this app.
help_faq_q2: Why is my battery data not syncing?
help_faq_a2: Check your network connection and ensure "Auto Sync" is enabled in Settings → Data & Sync. If the problem persists, try manually refreshing by pulling down on the home screen.
help_faq_q3: How accurate is the battery monitoring?
help_faq_a3: Battery data is provided by your device's operating system. Accuracy depends on your device model and OS version. For best results, allow the app to run in the background.
help_faq_a4: Yes! Go to Settings → Device Management to add and switch between multiple devices. Each device's data is stored separately.
help_faq_a5: Battery health indicates the maximum capacity of your battery compared to when it was new. A lower health percentage means your battery's capacity has degraded over time.
help_faq_q6: How do I export my battery data?
help_faq_a6: Navigate to Settings → Data History, select the date range you want to export, and click the export button to save your data as a CSV file.
help_info_contact: If you couldn't find the answer, please feel free to contact our support team:
help_info_response: We cannot guarantee a specific response time, but we strive to reply within 48 hours.
settings_desc_auto_sync: Automatically sync user settings across devices
settings_desc_battery_alerts: Alert when battery is low or fully charged
camera_info_permission: We need your permission to use the camera
camera_upload_tip: Upload a PNG/JPG image to quickly identify device SN.
history_dialog_clear_data: Are you sure you want to clear all data?
device_choose_binding: Please select a method to add a device.
device_dialog_unbind: Are you sure you want to unbind this device?
register_error_short: Password must be at least 8 characters

alertcontext_message_too_low: Your battery level is critically low. Please charge your device soon.
alertcontext_message_too_high: Your battery level is critically high. Please check your device.
